Our Crew

Meet the Team

We're a close-knit group of friends who turned a passion for the outdoors into a business. Every member brings unique skills and a genuine love for creating beautiful landscapes.

Riley Kopf

Founder & Lead

The visionary behind Lucky Landscapes. Riley leads every project with precision and a commitment to making each client's dream yard a reality.

Alex Martinez

Hardscaping Specialist

Our go-to for paver patios, retaining walls, and anything stone. Alex brings an artist's eye to every hardscape installation.

Jordan Hayes

Lawn & Garden Expert

From immaculate mowing lines to gorgeous garden beds, Jordan keeps every property looking its absolute best year-round.

Sam Bennett

Deck & Construction

Sam builds decks and patios that become the heart of a home's outdoor living space — sturdy, beautiful, and built to last.

Want to Join the Lucky Crew?

We're always looking for hardworking, passionate people to join our team.

Get in Touch
Lucky Landscapes

Creating outdoor spaces you'll feel lucky to have.
